sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns:
So what kind of music are you into?

번역결과  
안녕하세요!
Sure, I'm really into indie rock and alternative right now. How about you?
Oh cool, same here! Have you listened to any new releases lately?
Yeah, I've been listening to the new album by Arctic Monkeys and I love it.
Nice! I haven't checked that out yet, but I'll definitely give it a listen.
Definitely recommend it! And I heard they're touring soon, so maybe we can catch them live.
That would be amazing! What other artists or types of music do you enjoy?
Well, I also love classic rock and folk music. Some of my favorite bands include Led Zeppelin, Bob Dylan, and Neil Young.
Those are all great choices! I'm more of a pop/hip hop guy myself, but there's something special about those genres that I really appreciate.
Absolutely, there's such a rich history behind those genres and their impact on culture cannot be denied.
Exactly! It's amazing how music can transcend time and bring people together.
Yes, music has the power to unite us all despite our differences.
It truly does. Do you have a favorite concert experience?
One of my favorites was seeing Radiohead at Coachella a few years ago.
Wow, that sounds incredible! I've always wanted to attend Coachella, but never had the chance.
You should definitely try to go if you ever get the opportunity. It's an unforgettable experience.

Thanks for the suggestion, I'll keep that in mind!
번역제안  
정말이죠.
Of course, happy to help. Anything else you want to discuss about music?
Actually, I was wondering if you knew anything about the current state of the music industry?
Hmm, well the industry has changed quite a bit since the rise of streaming platforms.
Right, I've heard that these changes have both helped and hurt artists in different ways.
Indeed, while streaming has made it easier than ever for fans to access and discover new music, it's also led to declining revenues for musicians due to lower royalty rates.
I see. It's difficult when artistry and commerce collide like that.
Agree completely, it's important to strike a balance between supporting creators and ensuring fair compensation for everyone involved in the process.
Very true. On a lighter note, is there a song or artist that has had a significant impact on you personally?
As a matter of fact, "Killing Me Softly" by Roberta Flack had a big impact on me growing up.
Interesting choice! What draws you to that particular song?
Just the way it tells a story through the lyrics and captures emotions so beautifully through the voice and melody.
Gotcha. Music has the ability to evoke deep feelings and connect us emotionally to others who share similar experiences.
Precisely, which is why it remains such a powerful force in our lives.
